title: Shri Lakshmi Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Lakshmi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Lakshmi.
description:
Om Jai Lakshmi Mata,
Maiya Jai Lakshmi Mata.
Tumko nishidin sevat,
Hari Vishnu Vidhata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Uma, Rama, Brahmani,
Tum hi jag-mata.
Surya-chandrama dhyavat,
Narad rishi gaata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Durga roop niranjani,
Sukh sampatti data.
Jo koi tumko dhyavat,
Riddhi-siddhi dhan paata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Tum Patal-nivasini,
Tum hi shubhdhata.
Karma-prabhav-prakashini,
Bhavnidhi ki trata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Jis ghar mein tum rehti,
Sab sadgun aata.
Sab sambhav ho jaata,
Man nahi ghabrata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Tum bin yagya na hote,
Vastra na koi paata.
Khaan-paan ka vaibhav,
Sab tumse aata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Shubh-gun mandir sundar,
Kshirodadhi-jata.
Ratna chaturdash tum bin,
Koi nahi paata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Mahalakshmi ji ki aarti,
Jo koi nar gaave.
Ur anand samave,
Paap utar jaave॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Lakshmi Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: Goddess Lakshmi is the deity of wealth and fortune. Performing her Aarti ensures peace and happiness in the home, removes financial constraints, and invites prosperity and luxury into one's life.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Lakshmi Mata?
faq.a2: Friday is dedicated to Goddess Lakshmi. Fasting, reciting Lakshmi Chalisa, and performing the Aarti with full rituals on this day is considered highly fruitful. Her Aarti also holds special significance on Diwali.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) does Lakshmi Mata prefer during Aarti?
faq.a3: Goddess Lakshmi is very fond of white-colored sweets (such as Batashe, Makhana Kheer). Offering a lotus flower during the Aarti is considered the most auspicious way to please her.
faq.q4: Can Lakshmi Mata's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: You can perform the Aarti with a pure heart in front of an idol or picture of Goddess Lakshmi at home. Just ensure the place is clean and your devotion is sincere.
faq.q5: What is the benefit of reciting the Lakshmi Aarti regularly?
faq.a5: Regularly performing the Aarti brings positivity into life, clears negative energy, and ensures that the blessings of Goddess Lakshmi, along with Lord Vishnu, always remain in the home.
